completed_tasks.name: Quarantine faulty Dominion/Empire Ascendant implementation
completed_tasks.details: Moved active Dominion source and local artifacts out of games/ledgerofthelow into games/empireascendant/dominion/quarantine/2026-06-24-faulty-implementation and removed Dominion Makefile targets.

completed_tasks.name: Continuous test hardening rule
completed_tasks.details: Updated 01_Project_Rules.md and 09_Testing.md so federation/security/protocol/queue fixes require regression tests or documented exceptions.

completed_tasks.name: Local hub operator tooling
completed_tasks.details: Added cmd/hubadmin with nodes, node-suspend, node-activate, node-remove, queues, backup, rotate-key, token-issue, and token-revoke commands.

completed_tasks.name: Hub suspension semantics
completed_tasks.details: Made nodes.status='active' required for public directory/status visibility and authenticated hub endpoints. Added hub regression test.

completed_tasks.name: Protocol/spec cleanup
completed_tasks.details: Documented structured error shape, event cursor rules, unpaginated list limits, standard event payload fields, roster shape, stale roster rules, PvP/travel payload shapes.

completed_tasks.name: Legacy documentation quarantine
completed_tasks.details: Added historical/source-material warnings to legacy game docs and README indexes in docs/ and games/ledgerofthelow/files/. Deferred game-node framework extraction until a second approved game exists.

completed_tasks.name: Hub-admin regression tests
completed_tasks.details: Added tests for node-removal dry-run/execute behavior, queue filtering, backup creation and file mode, API-key rotation, and registration-token issue/revoke.

completed_tasks.name: Standard event schema validation
completed_tasks.details: Hub now rejects malformed Phase 1 standard events before they enter the feed. Reference emitters were updated to include required standard fields.

completed_tasks.name: Stale roster display coverage
completed_tasks.details: Reference game wanderers display now labels stale remote roster entries after the documented 15-minute freshness window and has tests.

completed_tasks.name: Root systemd documentation
completed_tasks.details: Added Debian/systemd examples for node and hub to 02_Architecture.md, corrected against the current binary flags and node config behavior.

completed_tasks.name: Hub-admin audit logging
completed_tasks.details: Database-backed mutating hub-admin commands now write non-secret audit rows. Tests verify dry-runs do not create audit rows.

completed_tasks.name: Backup restore-readback test
completed_tasks.details: Hub-admin backup tests now reopen the copied SQLite database and verify representative node, PvP, and travel rows.

completed_tasks.name: Non-Go Tier 1 and Tier 2 examples
completed_tasks.details: Added games/sdk/tier1_http.md and games/sdk/tier2_http.md for non-Go register/heartbeat/event/roster flows.

completed_tasks.name: Blocked queue lifecycle
completed_tasks.details: Implemented owner-scoped blocked states for malformed non-retryable PvP and travel queue payloads, including hub endpoints, syncer reporting, admin queue visibility, queue-retry, tests, and docs.

completed_tasks.name: Deployed-shape E2E hardening tests
completed_tasks.details: Added federation E2E coverage that runs a real hub process against SQLite and verifies reconnect replay after hub restart, cross-node debt.adjusted, duplicate travel rejection, return-home travel, and traveling-player status.

completed_tasks.name: Automated raw HTTP conformance coverage
completed_tasks.details: Added raw HTTP Tier 1/Tier 2 conformance coverage that exercises the protocol without using the Go federation client.

completed_tasks.name: Production-style backup restore rehearsal
completed_tasks.details: Copied the real contabo2 hub DB through SQLite .backup, opened a restored local copy with the current hub binary, verified status/directory/admin queue readback, and removed temporary DB copies afterward.

completed_tasks.name: Deploy production hub admin CLI
completed_tasks.details: Installed /usr/local/bin/interdoor-hub-admin on contabo2 as root:root 0755. Verified checksum, read-only nodes/queues, dry-run node-suspend thelow, and no audit row creation. Hub service was not restarted.

completed_tasks.name: Upgrade production hub binary and schema
completed_tasks.details: Backed up the production hub DB and old hub binary, installed the current interdoor-hub binary on contabo2, restarted interdoor-hub.service, verified public health/directory, migrated queue error/updated_at columns, and queue-retry schema path.

completed_tasks.name: Clarify hub portal node detail wording
completed_tasks.details: Updated the SSH portal detail screen to state that the hub lists nodes and does not launch game sessions, then show 'Open a new terminal and run:' with the node SSH command. Deployed to contabo2 and verified public health.

completed_tasks.name: Add human-readable game title display metadata
completed_tasks.details: Added optional game_title metadata while preserving game_id as the stable compatibility identifier. Updated hub schema, directory JSON, SSH portal display, federation registration client, hub-admin node-title command, tests, SDK/protocol docs, and deployed the hub/admin update to contabo2. Production thelow now displays Ledger of the Low while retaining game_id=ledger_of_the_low.

completed_tasks.name: Update InterDOOR hub portal logo and landing page mockup
completed_tasks.details: Moved the approved compact ANSI graphic to the InterDOOR hub portal only, preserving the 9-line hub header layout and Federated Terminal Game Network hub.interdoor.net tag. Restored Ledger game banner scope, added hub logo layout tests, deployed the new hub binary to contabo2, and updated the static hub.interdoor.net landing page mockup.

completed_tasks.name: Final documented Phase 1 hardening pass
completed_tasks.details: Added remote-roster partition cache coverage, updated root docs to record Phase 1 closeout status for the current small-network deployment, accepted SQLite for Phase 1 under documented operating rules, reran local tests/build/doc checks, and completed deployed hub acceptance checks including online backup/readback.

remaining_tasks.name: Consider broader deployed-node coverage
remaining_tasks.details: Only needed if Phase 1 requires E2E tests that run full node SSH binaries instead of a real hub process with real node stores.

remaining_tasks.name: Consider result/event audit linkage
remaining_tasks.details: Add traceability for PvP completions and debt projection changes if operators need per-event audit lookup before Phase 2.

decisions.decision: Empire Ascendant/Dominion remains Phase 2 or later
decisions.rationale: The earlier implementation was faulty and not approved Phase 1 work. Future work requires design review from the original Dominion material before coding.
Local CLI fits Phase 1's Debian/static-binary/simple-ops model and avoids exposing a network admin surface.

decisions.decision: Do not extract a generic game-node framework from Ledger alone
decisions.rationale: Only one approved game node exists. Framework guidance should wait until Ledger and a second approved game can be compared.
A suspend state that only hides public directory entries would be unsafe for compromised or faulty nodes.

Transient resolver/import failures stay pending for retry. Only victim or destination nodes may mark malformed non-retryable payloads blocked, and only local operators may reset them to pending after repair.

decisions.decision: SQLite is accepted for the current Phase 1 public hub deployment
decisions.rationale: The documented deployment shape is a small network with local-only administration and low write volume. Backups must use online backup or service-aware copy procedures, and restore/readback drills remain required hardening.

human_actions_pending.action: Approve Phase 2 design scope before implementation
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 1 hardening is complete for the current documented deployment shape. Empire Ascendant/Dominion remains Phase 2 and must be designed/reviewed before coding.
